Interface AlertRepository

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<Alert,UUID>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Alert,UUID>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<Alert,UUID>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<Alert,UUID>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<Alert,UUID>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<Alert>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<Alert,UUID>
public interface AlertRepository extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Alert,UUID>
Alert Repository

    Description
    Optional<Alert>
    findActiveByVehicleAndType(Vehicle vehicle, Maintenance.MaintenanceType type)
    Finds an alert by vehicle and maintenance type to automatically resolve an alert if a maintenance is created

  • Method Details

    • findByMaintenance

      Optional<Alert> findByMaintenance(Maintenance maintenance)
      Finds an alert by the maintenance its associated
      Parameters:
      maintenance - The maintenance given to find the alert
      Returns:
      An alert if any is associated

    • findActiveByVehicleAndType

      @Query("SELECT a FROM Alert a JOIN a.maintenance m WHERE m.vehicle = :vehicle AND m.type = :type AND a.resolvedAt IS NULL") Optional<Alert> findActiveByVehicleAndType(@Param("vehicle") Vehicle vehicle, @Param("type") Maintenance.MaintenanceType type)
      Finds an alert by vehicle and maintenance type to automatically resolve an alert if a maintenance is created
      Parameters:
      vehicle - The vehicle that had the maintenance created
      type - The type of maintenance created
      Returns:
      An alert if there is any associated
